summary: The diff implements the majority of the 11 requirements across backend and frontend. Most features are present and reasonably complete. However, several acceptance criteria have gaps: the Love Notes backend does not select a random recipient (frontend hardcodes a fixed principal), the 'Say Hello 👋' button does not pre-address the Messages component to the matched user, the Memory Jar scrapbook grid is missing a count badge on the profile nav, the Header nav is missing a direct Memory Jar link, and the progress ring in Deed of the Day is not confirmed implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Recipient principal chosen randomly from active users by the backend
missing_requirements.reason: The frontend hardcodes a fixed anonymous principal (Principal.fromText('2vxsx-fae')) instead of the backend selecting a random active user. The frontend comment explicitly says 'In production, the backend would handle random recipient selection', indicating this is not yet implemented end-to-end.

missing_requirements.requirement: 'Say Hello 👋' button opens the Messages component pre-addressed to that matched user
missing_requirements.reason: KindnessMatchCard.tsx handleSayHello only navigates to '/messages' without passing any pre-addressed user context, so the Messages component is not pre-addressed to the matched user.

missing_requirements.requirement: Jar count badge on the profile nav updates reactively
missing_requirements.reason: Profile.tsx retrieves jarCount but the diff content does not show a count badge rendered on the profile nav tab or icon. A nav-level badge is not confirmed present.

missing_requirements.requirement: Header includes a link to Memory Jar accessible from the nav
missing_requirements.reason: The Header.tsx diff shows links for Love Notes, Deed of the Day, and Kindness Matches in the dropdown, but no direct Memory Jar nav link is visible.

missing_requirements.requirement: Progress ring on the Deed of the Day community wall
missing_requirements.reason: The DeedOfTheDay.tsx file is truncated and a circular progress ring indicator is not visible in the available diff content. The AC explicitly requires a progress ring.

hallucinated_features.description: A separate backend/migration.mo Motoko module file was added
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request constraint states all Motoko logic must remain in the single backend/main.mo actor file. Creating a separate migration.mo module violates this constraint even though it is imported into main.mo.
